findingDetails.title: Live runtime uses stale generated code-graph scope globs after plural rename
findingDetails.recommendation: Rebuild mcp_server/dist from TypeScript and add a release grep guard for singular .opencode/(skill|agent|command)/ literals in live generated runtime paths.

findingDetails.title: Command-owned deep-review/deep-research YAML reads non-existent sk-deep-* skill paths
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace sk-deep-review and sk-deep-research with deep-review and deep-research across command YAML/docs, then dry-run both command workflows.

findingDetails.title: Skill advisor source still writes .opencode/skill/.advisor-state
findingDetails.recommendation: Move advisor state to .opencode/skills/.advisor-state or a neutral cache path, migrate/delete existing singular state, and update tests plus docs.

findingDetails.title: Packet 096 validation failure localizes to parent and 004-symlinks anchor/doc sufficiency defects
findingDetails.recommendation: Repair parent and 004-symlinks anchors, fill implementation-summary evidence, then rerun recursive strict validation.

findingDetails.title: User-facing setup docs still teach singular .opencode/agent/ and .opencode/command/ paths
findingDetails.recommendation: Update active setup docs to plural paths and leave archived/spec-history examples alone.

findingDetails.title: Generated dist tests and fixtures retain singular path fixtures
findingDetails.recommendation: Rebuild generated tests and fixtures after the source rename and classify legacy-compat fixtures explicitly.

findingDetails.title: Additional active setup and Barter helper files still carry singular root paths
findingDetails.recommendation: Update active doctor/setup guides and root Barter scripts or explicitly classify Barter root as out of scope.

title: Live runtime uses stale generated code-graph scope globs after plural rename
counterevidenceSought: Checked runtime configs and package metadata for TypeScript/source entrypoints; all sampled live entries route through dist JavaScript.
alternativeExplanation: Development tests may execute TypeScript source, but supported runtime launch paths do not.
recommendation: Rebuild dist and add a singular-path grep guard for live generated runtime paths.

title: Additional active setup and Barter helper files still carry singular root paths
counterevidenceSought: Bucketed case-insensitive singular path hits after excluding .git, node_modules, venvs, barter/coder, barter/repositories, caches, archived/spec-history, and generated outputs.
alternativeExplanation: Root Barter files may be intentionally separate, but they are not under the excluded vendored roots named by the review prompt.
recommendation: Update active setup guides and root Barter scripts or explicitly mark Barter root out of scope.

name: singular_path_bucket_counts
notes: Generated count includes 52 mcp_server/dist hits plus generated scripts/shared dist hits.
Active violation bucket contains five .opencode/install_guides files and six root barter files.

directions: P1-001 downgrade to P2 ruled out because dist is live through OpenCode, Codex, Gemini, Claude hooks, package exports, package bin, and npm start.
P1-003 one-time cleanup downgrade ruled out because advisor freshness and daemon lease source still writes .opencode/skill/.advisor-state.
Broad requested-dir dist wildfire ruled out for lib/deep-loop and lib/spec samples; singular source/dist drift in the sampled directories localized to code_graph/lib files.
